title: dimorphocalyx ramiflorus
intro: Dimorphocalyx ramiflorus, also known as the 'River Mangrove', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dimorphocalyx ramiflorus include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Dimorphocalyx ramiflorus can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, or topical creams for various health benefits, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
